author: Jorge Asenjo
name: SP8192 PR #1855 Base + Asymmetric Logit Rescale + AWQ-lite (full val)
blurb: PR #1855 stack (LQER asym int4 + Sparse Attn Gate + BOS-Fixed SmearGate + 9-hparam greedy + per-group lrzip) with two orthogonal additions on top: (1) Asymmetric Logit Rescale on the eval/TTT path (two learnable softcap_pos/softcap_neg scalars trained inside Phased TTT, modded-nanogpt #181 by classiclarryd), and (2) AWQ-lite mixed-precision GPTQ keeping the top-1 64-col activation-saliency group at int8 (PR #1908 by romeerp). Measured on the full validation partition (47,851,520 tokens) after correcting the truncated-val partition reported in the original v1 of this PR. 3-seed mean val_bpb 1.05971 (population std 0.000478).

revisions.note: Original submission. Val measurement was on a truncated validation partition (9,662,464 tokens) due to a corrupted shard in the local network volume. @codemath3000 caught this on review by comparing val_tokens lines.

Re-measured on full validation partition (47,851,520 tokens, identical to #1855's reference). AWQ-lite added as concurrent independent finding alongside @romeerp's PR #1908 — orthogonal stack with AsymLogit. 3-seed strict-compliant: train ≤599.6s, eval ≤532s, max artifact 15,985,176 bytes.
